pi_items.source: Code analysis of seed_library.py: CLASSIC_PAPERS (10 items) + ML_PAPERS (8 items) seeded by --mode all

Verification of seed_library.py CLASSIC_PAPERS: Turing (1950), Huffman (1952), Watson-Crick (1953), Dijkstra (1959), McCarthy (1960)

privileged_info_summary: The task contains 18 real academic papers across three chronological eras. All papers are verified to exist with correct publication years and authors from authoritative sources. Pre-1950 Foundations contains 5 foundational papers (Einstein 1905, Turing 1936, Church 1936, Shannon 1948, Shannon-Weaver 1949). The 1950-1999 Classical era contains 5 papers spanning the mid-20th century (Turing 1950, Huffman 1952, Watson-Crick 1953, Dijkstra 1959, McCarthy 1960). The 2000s and Beyond era contains 8 deep learning and ML papers (2012-2020). All papers are correctly categorized by their publication years according to the specified ranges.
